ddt:Target.Name: USA_CMFB_V_2_8
ddt:Target.Description:
version 2.7.1 ECU name : USA1 (Low Line) USA2 (High Line) Supplier : Valeo PDE : S.CHEBBI DEA-SAD4
$$$$$$$******Diag Base Updates******$$$$$$$ V2.3 : $1903 "ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshotIdentification" renamed to "ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTCSnapshotIdentification" ********************************************** V2.4 SW6 Low Line Auto ident Working fine ********************************************** V2.5 SW6.42 & SW6.22 Auto Ident working ********************************************** V2.6 Implementation of snapshot ********************************************** V2.7 Deletion of 6 not-used parameter on GCFG4 (HFP group configuration) (reduced from 81 to 75bytes) ********************************************** V2.7.1 Deletion of BSW_status_led.day and night vision
$$$$$$$******Known issues******$$$$$$$
SW05.41 (High Line) Diagnostic IO-Control request for Return Control to ECU of the UPA LED is: 2f 20 34 00 00 ********************************************** SW05.46 (Low Line) VIN can be set once using the DID F190 in extended mode. Security Access is not supported In case sensor DTCs are healed while the ECU is shutdown, a clear all DTC is necessary to re-align the ECU after startup (VDR_33508) Diagnostic IO-Control request for Return Control to ECU of the UPA LED is: 2f 20 34 00 00 ********************************************** SW06.10 (Low Line) VIN can be set once using the DID F190 in extended mode. Security Access is not supported ********************************************** SW06.20 (High Line) Diagnostic IO-Control request for Return Control to ECU of the UPA LED is: 2f 20 34 00 00 ********************************************** SW06.30 (High Line) Diagnostic IO-Control request for Return Control to ECU of the UPA LED is: 2f 20 34 00 00 VIN update with Secure Access is only supported in the programming mode (10 02) and not in the application mode ********************************************** SW06.31 (High Line) VIN update with Secure Access is only supported in the programming mode (10 02) and not in the application mode. Diagnostic IO-Control request for Return Control to ECU of the UPA LED is: 2f 20 34 00 00 ********************************************** SW06.32 (High Line) VIN update with Secure Access is only supported in the programming mode (10 02) and not in the application mode Diagnostic IO-Control request for Return Control to ECU of the UPA LED is: 2f 20 34 00 00 High Line Auto Ident not working

Data.Name: cfg.FrontDetectionState
Data.Comment: Front Detection activation state, change when User preference menu or button or Diag tool.

Data.Name: cfg.RearDetectionState
Data.Comment: Rear Detection activation state, change when User preference menu or button or Diag tool.

Item.Text: LED is light when UPA is OFF
LED is light when UPA is ON
Only once in Power ON cycle

Data.Name: cfg.BuzzerSoundIndex
Data.Comment: Sound level index, change parameter when User preference menu or Diag tool.

Item.Text: UPA/FKP Permanent/Temporary (A.16 switch dedicated to UPA/FKP Permanent/Temporary)
HFP (A.16 switch dedicated to HFP and UPA/FKP activated via Cluster/MMI)
UPA/FKP Permanent (A.16 switch dedicated to UPA/FKP Permanent)
HFPB (A.16 switch dedicated to HFPB and UPA/FKP activated via Cluster/MMI)
PSM (A.16 switch dedicated to PSM and UPA/FKP activated via Cluster/MMI)
UPA/FKP Permanent/Temporary + PSM Dedicated switch (A.16 switch dedicated to UPA/FKP Permanent/Temporary and B.10 switch Dedicated to PSM)
UPA/FKP Permanent + PSM Dedicated switch (A.16 switch dedicated to UPA/FKP Permanent and B.10 switch Dedicated to PSM)

Data.Name: VehicleSpeed
Data.Comment: Vehicle speed read on the CAN

Data.Name: UPAStatusFrame.LED
Data.Comment: To read the UPA or HFP switch LED state

Item.Text: the button has not been pushed yet
the button was pushed at least one time

Data.Name: cfg.4WS_VehicleEquipped
Data.Comment: Engineering config for HFP and FKP

Data.Name: cfg.SideDetectionState
Data.Comment: Rear detection state, change parameter when Switch push, User preference menu or Diag tool.

Data.Name: cfg.BSW_Presence
Data.Comment: Define if the BSW feature is present or not

Data.Name: cfg.BSW_Switch_Presence
Data.Comment: Define if the BSW feature uses a switch or not

Data.Name: BSW_SystemStatus
Data.Comment: To read the BSW system state

Data.Name: cfg.BSW_MaxSteeringAngle
Data.Comment: Max Steering angle to activate BSW

Data.Name: UPAStatusFrame.TrailerPresence
Data.Comment: To read the trailer presence (trailer connected to ECU)

Data.Name: cfg.PSM_Switch_LED_day_brightness
Data.Comment: Sets LED PWM Value in accordance with value of CAN message DayNightForBacklights

Data.Name: cfg.PSM_Switch_LED_night_brightness
Data.Comment: Sets LED PWM Value in accordance with value of CAN message DayNightForBacklights

Data.Name: cfg.PSM_Switch_LED_twilight_brightness
Data.Comment: Sets LED PWM Value in accordance with value of CAN message DayNightForBacklights

Data.Name: cfg.UPA_HFP_Switch_LED_day_brightness
Data.Comment: Sets LED PWM Value in accordance with value of CAN message DayNightForBacklights

Data.Name: cfg.UPA_HFP_Switch_LED_night_brightness
Data.Comment: Sets LED PWM Value in accordance with value of CAN message DayNightForBacklights

Data.Name: cfg.UPA_HFP_Switch_LED_twilight_brightness
Data.Comment: Sets LED PWM Value in accordance with value of CAN message DayNightForBacklights

Data.Name: gcfg.DisplayInterrupt
Data.Comment: See UPA_CMFB_Diagnosis. REQ_UPA_HMI_0432 . REQ_UPA_HMI_0434 and REQ_UPA_HMI_0436

Item.Text: LED is light when UPA is OFF
LED is light when UPA is ON
Only once in Power ON cycle
UPA/FKP Permanent/Temporary (A.16 switch dedicated to UPA/FKP Permanent/Temporary)
HFP (A.16 switch dedicated to HFP and UPA/FKP activated via Cluster/MMI)
UPA/FKP Permanent (A.16 switch dedicated to UPA/FKP Permanent)
HFPB (A.16 switch dedicated to HFPB and UPA/FKP activated via Cluster/MMI)
PSM (A.16 switch dedicated to PSM and UPA/FKP activated via Cluster/MMI)
UPA/FKP Permanent/Temporary + PSM Dedicated switch (A.16 switch dedicated to UPA/FKP Permanent/Temporary and B.10 switch Dedicated to PSM)
UPA/FKP Permanent + PSM Dedicated switch (A.16 switch dedicated to UPA/FKP Permanent and B.10 switch Dedicated to PSM)
LEDs are OFF under/over speed thresholds
LEDs are ON under/over speed thresholds

Data.Name: gcfg2.BSW_WarningLevel2_LED_Flashing_Rate
Data.Comment: See REQ_BSW_USA_059(A) and REQ_BSW_USA_060(A) and UPA_CMFB_Diagnosis

Data.Name: gcfg4.HFP_Threshold.SpeedThresholdForExitingStartOfMission
Data.Comment: See [REQ_S_HFP_USA_303]a. [REQ_S_ HFP_USA _307]a. HFP Statechart and UPA and UPA_CMFB_Diagnosis

Data.Name: gcfg4.SideDetectionState
Data.Comment: See UPA_CMFB_Diagnosis. REQ_FKP_FCT_0305. REQ_FKP_FCT_0310 and REQ_FKP_FCT_0315

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_cm_DefaultSideWalkHight
Data.Comment: Crossed distance threshold to determined weather the sidewalk is crossed or not .

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_m_AccelMaxFFD_interp_high
Data.Comment: High distance value of the interpolation parameter for Maximum acceleration level provided by feedfo

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_m_AccelMaxFFD_interp_low
Data.Comment: Low distance value of the interpolation parameter for Maximum acceleration level provided by feedfor

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_m_brakeStoppingDistanceTh
Data.Comment: Indicates the remaining distance threshold. activates the brakes when reached.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_m_Minimum_finish_distance
Data.Comment: Remaning Distance value to consider that movement is finished.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_m_PI_interp_high
Data.Comment: PI regulator coefficient are interpolated regarding the distance to stop. This parameter is the dist

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_m_PI_interp_low
Data.Comment: PI regulator coefficient are interpolated regarding the distance to stop. This parameter is the dist

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_m_StoppingDistance_Sdwlk
Data.Comment: Minimum stopping distance value received by VMC to allow sidewalk detection strategy.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_m_StoppingDistanceTh
Data.Comment: Threshold for activating the distance achieve flag.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_m_StpngDistTh4MtrOptimOFF
Data.Comment: This value represent the stop distance threshold under witch the motor optimization strategy is swit

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps_CANSpeedMeasureMin
Data.Comment: Speed value under which the can measured speed is equal to zero.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps_DriveOffSpeedThd
Data.Comment: Speed Threshold under which the driveOff strategy is activated.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps_ManeuverSpeedMax
Data.Comment: Parameter that is used as Vmax request if Vmax Choice Parameter is set to false.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps_MinVehicleSpeedFinish
Data.Comment: Vehicle speed value to consider that a movement is finished.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps_MvtDetecSpeedThreshold
Data.Comment: Vehicle speed threshold for movement detection module.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps_VehicleSpeed_Sdwlk
Data.Comment: Vehicle speed maximum value to consider sidewalk blockage.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_AccelBrakeMax
Data.Comment: Maximum level of deceleration to be achieved by braking.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_AccelMax
Data.Comment: Upper saturation limit of Brake Cancel Module's the discrete integrator.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_AccelMaxBrkAct
Data.Comment: Upper saturation limit of the discrete integrator.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_AccelMaxBrkCancel
Data.Comment: Upper Saturation level of BrakeCancel module's .

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_AccelMaxFFD_high
Data.Comment: High value of the Maximum acceleration level provided by feedforward term..

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_AccelMaxFFD_low
Data.Comment: Low value of the Maximum acceleration level provided by feedforward term..

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_AccelMinFFD
Data.Comment: Minimum acceleration level provided by feedforward term.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_AccelMinPID
Data.Comment: Minimum acceleration authorized for anti-windup term (PI).

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_brakeSlopeChangeTh
Data.Comment: Acceleration target level under which brakes release is smoother.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_ComfortBraking
Data.Comment: Vehicle acceleration level target for comfort braking.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_EmergencyBraking
Data.Comment: Vehicle acceleration level target for emergency braking.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_measuredAccelMaxLim
Data.Comment: Maximal acceleration limitation for speed rate limiter.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_measuredAccelMinLim
Data.Comment: Minimal acceleration limitation for speed rate limiter.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_NoTrq4BrkCancel
Data.Comment: Acceleration target when no brake cancel is perform .

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_PWTLimitAccel
Data.Comment: Parameter that determine the acceleration permited on PWT level.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_TakeOffAccelMin
Data.Comment: Minimum acceleration outputed by the take off trategy .

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_VhSpdGradientSdwk
Data.Comment: Vehicle acceleration threshold when blocked against sidewalk.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps3_AccelRateLimDown
Data.Comment: Minimal slope of acceleration variation for acceleration rate limiter.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps3_AccelRateLimUp
Data.Comment: Maximal slope of acceleration variation for acceleration rate limiter.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps3_BrakeActivationRamp
Data.Comment: Slope of the brake's activation ramp.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps3_BrakeCancelRampFast
Data.Comment: Fast slope of the brakes cancel ramp.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps3_BrakeCancelRampSlow
Data.Comment: Smooth slope of the brakes cancel ramp.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps3_MinBrakingJerk
Data.Comment: Lower value of the rate limiter of Emergency regulation bloc.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps3_TakeOffRamp
Data.Comment: This is the targeted acceleration ramp used in the take off trategy .

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_mps3_TakeOffRamp_Init
Data.Comment: Initial value of the acceleration ramp used in the take off trategy .

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_Nm_BrakingRampSatMax
Data.Comment: Maximum Braking request value of the ramp-like braking request for Comfort and Emergency stop .

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_Nm_BrkWheelTrq4OrderOFF
Data.Comment: Switch OFF point of the Relay bock for BrakeWheelTorqueOrder Computation.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_Nm_BrkWheelTrq4OrderON
Data.Comment: Switch ON point of the Relay bock for BrakeWheelTorqueOrder Computation.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_Nm_DefaultBrkTrqReq
Data.Comment: Default brake torque sent to the braking system.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_Nm_DefaultWheelMotorTrq
Data.Comment: Default powertrain wheel torque request when the powertrain request is deactivated (=0).

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_Nm_FullBrakeTorque
Data.Comment: Torque request sent to the braking system to maintain the vehicle at standstill.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_Nm_MaxPowerTrainTorque1
Data.Comment: Maximum Power train torque to be delivered by the sidewalk strategy in the first part of the strateg

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_Nm_MaxPowerTrainTorque2
Data.Comment: Maximum Power train torque to be delivered by the sidewalk strategy in the first part of the strateg

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_Nm_PWTTrqAchievblMinOptim
Data.Comment: Minimum achievable powertrain torque in motor-optim mode.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_Nm_PWTTrqMaxeffortSlope
Data.Comment: maximal motor torque request value for sidewalk detection.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_Nm_Slope_torque_low
Data.Comment: Lower slope torque limitation for PI windup calculation.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_Nm_Slope_torque_up
Data.Comment: Higher slope torque limitation for PI windup calculation.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_Nm_WheelTrqWithoutSlope
Data.Comment: Overall Minimim wheel torque without slope coponent to be consider for sidewalk blockage detection.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_Nmps_BrkgRqRLLowerLim
Data.Comment: Lower limit of the Rate limiter for Braking request .

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_Nmps_BrkgRqRLUpperLim
Data.Comment: Upper limit of the Rate limiter for Braking request .

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_Nmps_ComfortRamp
Data.Comment: Braking request ramp value for Comfort braking request.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_Nmps_EmergencyRamp
Data.Comment: Braking request ramp value for Emergency braking request.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_Nmps_WheelMotorTrqLowLimt
Data.Comment: Lower limit of the rate limiter for the powertrain torque request .

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_Nmps_WheelMotorTrqUpLimit
Data.Comment: Upper limit of the rate limiter for the powertrain torque request .

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_pct_IsUpHillTh
Data.Comment: This parameter is a slope threshold over witch we determine that vehicle is going uphill.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_pct_SlopeTh4BrkCancel
Data.Comment: Slope threshold under witch the brake cancel phase is perform with the ramp strategy .

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_s_Detection_While
Data.Comment: The minimal time between setting sidewalk detection flag and clearing the sidewalk detection flag.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_s_DetectionTime_FS
Data.Comment: Time between real sidewalk detection and setting the sidewalk detection flag.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_s_ElapsedTimeConfirmed
Data.Comment: Elapsed timpe threshold for no movement detection module.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_s_Epsilon
Data.Comment: Minimum error between ElapsedTime and ElapsedTimeConfirmed to switch from MOVEMENT state to WAIT_MO

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_s_TauDerivFF
Data.Comment: Constant time for speed target low-pass filtering.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_s_tauSpeedControl
Data.Comment: Constant time for distance target adaptation regarding remaining distance to cover before stop.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_s_TempoBefore2ndTest
Data.Comment: Temporization before activating the second part of the strategy and calculate torque to be added to

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_s_TempoBeforeRamp
Data.Comment: Temporisation before activating the take off strategie. .

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_s_TempoVehBlockedOnsdwk
Data.Comment: Elapsed timpe after no movement detection before considering that vehicle is stuck against a sidewal

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_s_topWaitingTime
Data.Comment: Time with no wheel encoder change to consider that vehicle is at standstill.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_tic_GearEngagedTime
Data.Comment: Temporization (number of clock occurrences) to wait after gear change

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_tic_WaitEngineTime
Data.Comment: Number of clock occurrences between motor torque request and beginning of maneuver

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_tic_WaitReleaseTime
Data.Comment: Number of clock occurrences between end of movement and VMC switch-off

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_BrkgRampAct
Data.Comment: Parameter that activate or not the Braking ramp.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_BrkWheelTrqOrderChoice
Data.Comment: % Parameter for BrkWheelTrqOrder computation choice. between VMC superviror and pressure comparaison

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_derivativeBrakeGain
Data.Comment: Derivative gain of PID controler for emergengy/comfort braking regulation.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_derivativeGain
Data.Comment: Derivative gain of the acceleration PID controler.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_EmergencyBraking
Data.Comment: Vehicle acceleration level target for emergency braking.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_feedForwardON
Data.Comment: Parameter: activation of the feedforward strategy (switch on or switch off).

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_FFDInitAccelMax
Data.Comment: Initial value of FFD maximum acceleration level target.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_FilterCoefficient
Data.Comment: Gain of the filtered derivative part of the PID controler.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_HFPB_AccelLimitChoice
Data.Comment: Factor to chose whether or not the Slope component is added to the maximum acceleration of th PI reg

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_HFPB_TorqueModulation
Data.Comment: Factor to modulate higher anti-windup PI value.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_InitialValueRateLimiter
Data.Comment: Initial acceleration value of the rate limiter of Emergency regulation bloc.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_integralBrakeGain
Data.Comment: Integral gain of PID controler for emergengy/comfort braking regulation.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_integralGain_high
Data.Comment: PI regulator coefficient are interpolated regarding the distance to stop. This parameter is the high

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_integralGain_low
Data.Comment: PI regulator coefficient are interpolated regarding the distance to stop. This parameter is the lowe

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_Kb
Data.Comment: Gain parameter for anti wind-up term (PI).

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_LowerLimitRateLimiter56
Data.Comment: Lower value of the rate limiter of Brake torque arbritation Module.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_motorOptimON
Data.Comment: Parameter: activation of an adapted powertrain control strategy on slopes (switch on - switch off).

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_MotorTorqueAdapt
Data.Comment: Factor for PWT torque request adaptation.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_NumberWheelTops
Data.Comment: Number max of wheeltop for a wheel.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_proportionalBrakeGain
Data.Comment: Proportional gain of PID controler for emergengy/comfort braking regulation.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_proportionalGain_high
Data.Comment: PI regulator coefficient are interpolated regarding the distance to stop. This parameter is the high

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_proportionalGain_low
Data.Comment: PI regulator coefficient are interpolated regarding the distance to stop. This parameter is the lowe

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_Rapidity_Coeff
Data.Comment: Time constant of the curve of the Sidewalk torque added to the PWT request .

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_ResetRateLimiter
Data.Comment: Reset input of the rate limiter bloc.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_SideWalkStragActivation
Data.Comment: Parameter to adapt the sidewalk torque computed by the strategy .

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_SideWalkStratAct
Data.Comment: Parameter to adapt the sidewalk torque computed by the strategy .

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_UpperLimitRateLimiter
Data.Comment: Upper acceleration value of the rate limiter of Emergency regulation bloc.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_UpperLimitRateLimiter56
Data.Comment: Upper value of the rate limiter of Brake torque arbritation Module.

Data.Name: gcfg5.P_tng_x_VmaxChoice
Data.Comment: Parameter to chose beetween Parking system Vmax and configurable Vmax in the PLC.

Data.Name: gcfg1.4WS_VehicleEquipped
Data.Comment: Engineering config for HFP and FKP

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifierList
Data.Comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control - The list defined here is AN EXAMPLE.
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level OutOfRange/0 adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed / blocked
No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Data.Name: cfg.BSW_Status_LED_day_brightness
Data.Comment: Sets LED PWM Value in accordance with value of CAN message DayNightForBacklights

Data.Name: cfg.BSW_Status_LED_night_brightness
Data.Comment: Sets LED PWM Value in accordance with value of CAN message DayNightForBacklights

Data.Name: cfg.BSW_Status_LED_twilight_brightness
Data.Comment: Sets LED PWM Value in accordance with value of CAN message DayNightForBacklights

Data.Name: cfg.BSW_Warning_LED_day_brightness
Data.Comment: Sets LED PWM Value in accordance with value of CAN message DayNightForBacklights

Data.Name: cfg.BSW_Warning_LED_night_brightness
Data.Comment: Sets LED PWM Value in accordance with value of CAN message DayNightForBacklights

Data.Name: cfg.BSW_Warning_LED_twilight_brightness
Data.Comment: Sets LED PWM Value in accordance with value of CAN message DayNightForBacklights

Data.Name: cfg.BSW_Switch_LED_day_brightness
Data.Comment: Sets LED PWM Value in accordance with value of CAN message DayNightForBacklights

Data.Name: cfg.BSW_Switch_LED_night_brightness
Data.Comment: Sets LED PWM Value in accordance with value of CAN message DayNightForBacklights

Data.Name: cfg.BSW_Switch_LED_twilight_brightness
Data.Comment: Sets LED PWM Value in accordance with value of CAN message DayNightForBacklights

Item.Text: HFP deactivated, HFPB deactivated, APK deactivated, PSM deactivated
HFP activated, HFPB deactivated, APK deactivated, PSM deactivated
HFP deactivated, HFPB activated, APK deactivated, PSM deactivated
HFP deactivated, HFPB deactivated, APK activated, PSM deactivated
HFP deactivated, HFPB deactivated, APK deactivated, PSM activated

Data.Name: BSW_LeftStatusLED
Data.Comment: PWM Value for activaing BSW Status LED

Data.Name: BSW_RightStatusLED
Data.Comment: PWM Value for activaing BSW Status LED

Item.Text: LEDs are OFF under/over speed thresholds
LEDs are ON under/over speed thresholds

Data.Name: cfg.DDD_UTAPresence
Data.Comment: See equivalent .cfg and DDT Database for mapping.

Data.Name: VehicleState
Data.Description: 0=Sleeping 1=Not used 2=CutoffPending 3=AutoACC - BatTempoLevel 4=Not used 5=IgnitionLevel 6=StartingInProgress 7=PowertrainRunning 8=AutoStart 9=EngineSystemStop 10=Not used 11=Not used 12=Not used 13=Not used 14=Not used 15=Unavailable

Data.Name: P_tng_cm_DefaultSideWalkHeight
Data.Comment: Crossed distance threshold to determined weather the sidewalk is crossed or not .

Data.Name: P_tng_mps_CANSpeedMeasureMin
Data.Comment: Speed value under which the can measured speed is equal to zero.

Data.Name: P_tng_mps_DriveOffSpeedThd
Data.Comment: Speed Threshold under which the driveOff strategy is activated.

Data.Name: P_tng_mps_ManeuverSpeedMax
Data.Comment: Parameter that is used as Vmax request if Vmax Choice Parameter is set to false.

Data.Name: P_tng_mps2_AccelMax
Data.Comment: Upper saturation limit of Brake Cancel Module's the discrete integrator.

Data.Name: P_tng_mps2_AccelMaxBrkAct
Data.Comment: Upper saturation limit of the discrete integrator.

Data.Name: P_tng_mps2_AccelMaxBrkCancel
Data.Comment: Upper Saturation level of BrakeCancel module's .

Data.Name: P_tng_mps2_ComfortBraking
Data.Comment: Vehicle acceleration level target for comfort braking.

Data.Name: P_tng_mps2_PWTLimitAccel
Data.Comment: Parameter that determine the acceleration permited on PWT level.

Data.Name: P_tng_mps2_TakeOffAccelMin
Data.Comment: Minimum acceleration outputed by the take off trategy .

Data.Name: P_tng_mps2_VhSpdGradientSdwk
Data.Comment: Vehicle acceleration threshold when blocked against sidewalk.

Data.Name: P_tng_Nm_BrakingRampSatMax
Data.Comment: Maximum Braking request value of the ramp-like braking request for Comfort and Emergency stop .

Data.Name: P_tng_Nm_BrkWheelTrq4OrderOFF
Data.Comment: Switch OFF point of the Relay bock for BrakeWheelTorqueOrder Computation.

Data.Name: P_tng_Nm_BrkWheelTrq4OrderON
Data.Comment: Switch ON point of the Relay bock for BrakeWheelTorqueOrder Computation.

Data.Name: P_tng_Nm_MaxPowerTrainTorque1
Data.Comment: Maximum Power train torque to be delivered by the sidewalk strategy in the first part of the strateg

Data.Name: P_tng_Nm_MaxPowerTrainTorque2
Data.Comment: Maximum Power train torque to be delivered by the sidewalk strategy in the first part of the strateg

Data.Name: P_tng_Nmps_BrkgRqRLLowerLim
Data.Comment: Lower limit of the Rate limiter for Braking request .

Data.Name: P_tng_Nmps_BrkgRqRLUpperLim
Data.Comment: Upper limit of the Rate limiter for Braking request .

Data.Name: P_tng_Nmps_ComfortRamp
Data.Comment: Braking request ramp value for Comfort braking request.

Data.Name: P_tng_Nmps_EmergencyRamp
Data.Comment: Braking request ramp value for Emergency braking request.

Data.Name: P_tng_pct_IsUpHillTh
Data.Comment: This parameter is a slope threshold over witch we determine that vehicle is going uphill.

Data.Name: P_tng_s_TempoBefore2ndTest
Data.Comment: Temporization before activating the second part of the strategy and calculate torque to be added to

Data.Name: P_tng_s_TempoVehBlockedOnsdwk
Data.Comment: Elapsed timpe after no movement detection before considering that vehicle is stuck against a sidewal

Data.Name: P_tng_tic_GearEngagedTime
Data.Comment: Temporization (number of clock occurrences) to wait after gear change

Data.Name: P_tng_x_BrkgRampAct
Data.Comment: Parameter that activate or not the Braking ramp.

Data.Name: P_tng_x_BrkWheelTrqOrderChoice
Data.Comment: % Parameter for BrkWheelTrqOrder computation choice. between VMC superviror and pressure comparaison

Data.Name: P_tng_x_derivativeGain
Data.Comment: Derivative gain of the acceleration PID controler.

Data.Name: P_tng_x_feedForwardON
Data.Comment: Parameter: activation of the feedforward strategy (switch on or switch off).

Data.Name: P_tng_x_HFPB_AccelLimitChoice
Data.Comment: Factor to chose whether or not the Slope component is added to the maximum acceleration of th PI reg

Data.Name: P_tng_x_LowerLimitRateLimiter56
Data.Comment: Lower value of the rate limiter of Brake torque arbritation Module.

Data.Name: P_tng_x_NumberWheelTops
Data.Comment: Number max of wheeltop for a wheel.

Data.Name: P_tng_x_Rapidity_Coeff
Data.Comment: Time constant of the curve of the Sidewalk torque added to the PWT request .

Data.Name: P_tng_x_SideWalkStratAct
Data.Comment: Parameter to adapt the sidewalk torque computed by the strategy .

Data.Name: P_tng_x_UpperLimitRateLimiter
Data.Comment: Upper acceleration value of the rate limiter of Emergency regulation bloc.

Data.Name: P_tng_x_UpperLimitRateLimiter56
Data.Comment: Upper value of the rate limiter of Brake torque arbritation Module.

Data.Name: P_tng_x_VmaxChoice
Data.Comment: Parameter to chose beetween Parking system Vmax and configurable Vmax in the PLC.

Data.Name: P_tng_m_AccelMaxFFD_interp_high
Data.Comment: High distance value of the interpolation parameter for Maximum acceleration level provided by feedfo

Data.Name: P_tng_m_AccelMaxFFD_interp_low
Data.Comment: Low distance value of the interpolation parameter for Maximum acceleration level provided by feedfor

Data.Name: P_tng_m_brakeStoppingDistanceTh
Data.Comment: Indicates the remaining distance threshold. activates the brakes when reached.

Data.Name: P_tng_m_Minimum_finish_distance
Data.Comment: Remaning Distance value to consider that movement is finished.

Data.Name: P_tng_m_PI_interp_high
Data.Comment: PI regulator coefficient are interpolated regarding the distance to stop. This parameter is the dist

Data.Name: P_tng_m_PI_interp_low
Data.Comment: PI regulator coefficient are interpolated regarding the distance to stop. This parameter is the dist

Data.Name: P_tng_m_StoppingDistance_Sdwlk
Data.Comment: Minimum stopping distance value received by VMC to allow sidewalk detection strategy.

Data.Name: P_tng_m_StoppingDistanceTh
Data.Comment: Threshold for activating the distance achieve flag.

Data.Name: P_tng_m_StpngDistTh4MtrOptimOFF
Data.Comment: This value represent the stop distance threshold under witch the motor optimization strategy is swit

Data.Name: P_tng_mps_MinVehicleSpeedFinish
Data.Comment: Vehicle speed value to consider that a movement is finished.

Data.Name: P_tng_mps_MvtDetecSpeedThreshold
Data.Comment: Vehicle speed threshold for movement detection module.

Data.Name: P_tng_mps_VehicleSpeed_Sdwlk
Data.Comment: Vehicle speed maximum value to consider sidewalk blockage.

Data.Name: P_tng_mps2_AccelBrakeMax
Data.Comment: Maximum level of deceleration to be achieved by braking.

Data.Name: P_tng_mps2_AccelMaxFFD_high
Data.Comment: High value of the Maximum acceleration level provided by feedforward term..

Data.Name: P_tng_mps2_AccelMaxFFD_low
Data.Comment: Low value of the Maximum acceleration level provided by feedforward term..

Data.Name: P_tng_mps2_AccelMinFFD
Data.Comment: Minimum acceleration level provided by feedforward term.

Data.Name: P_tng_mps2_AccelMinPID
Data.Comment: Minimum acceleration authorized for anti-windup term (PI).

Data.Name: P_tng_mps2_brakeSlopeChangeTh
Data.Comment: Acceleration target level under which brakes release is smoother.

Data.Name: P_tng_mps2_EmergencyBraking
Data.Comment: Vehicle acceleration level target for emergency braking.

Data.Name: P_tng_mps2_measuredAccelMaxLim
Data.Comment: Maximal acceleration limitation for speed rate limiter.

Data.Name: P_tng_mps2_measuredAccelMinLim
Data.Comment: Minimal acceleration limitation for speed rate limiter.

Data.Name: P_tng_mps2_NoTrq4BrkCancel
Data.Comment: Acceleration target when no brake cancel is perform .

Data.Name: P_tng_mps3_AccelRateLimDown
Data.Comment: Minimal slope of acceleration variation for acceleration rate limiter.

Data.Name: P_tng_mps3_AccelRateLimUp
Data.Comment: Maximal slope of acceleration variation for acceleration rate limiter.

Data.Name: P_tng_mps3_BrakeActivationRamp
Data.Comment: Slope of the brake's activation ramp.

Data.Name: P_tng_mps3_BrakeCancelRampFast
Data.Comment: Fast slope of the brakes cancel ramp.

Data.Name: P_tng_mps3_BrakeCancelRampSlow
Data.Comment: Smooth slope of the brakes cancel ramp.

Data.Name: P_tng_mps3_MinBrakingJerk
Data.Comment: Lower value of the rate limiter of Emergency regulation bloc.

Data.Name: P_tng_mps3_TakeOffRamp
Data.Comment: This is the targeted acceleration ramp used in the take off trategy .

Data.Name: P_tng_mps3_TakeOffRamp_Init
Data.Comment: Initial value of the acceleration ramp used in the take off trategy .

Data.Name: P_tng_Nm_DefaultBrkTrqReq
Data.Comment: Default brake torque sent to the braking system.

Data.Name: P_tng_Nm_DefaultWheelMotorTrq
Data.Comment: Default powertrain wheel torque request when the powertrain request is deactivated (=0).

Data.Name: P_tng_Nm_FullBrakeTorque
Data.Comment: Torque request sent to the braking system to maintain the vehicle at standstill.

Data.Name: P_tng_Nm_PWTTrqAchievblMinOptim
Data.Comment: Minimum achievable powertrain torque in motor-optim mode.

Data.Name: P_tng_Nm_PWTTrqMaxeffortSlope
Data.Comment: maximal motor torque request value for sidewalk detection.

Data.Name: P_tng_Nm_Slope_torque_low
Data.Comment: Lower slope torque limitation for PI windup calculation.

Data.Name: P_tng_Nm_Slope_torque_up
Data.Comment: Higher slope torque limitation for PI windup calculation.

Data.Name: P_tng_Nm_WheelTrqWithoutSlope
Data.Comment: Overall Minimim wheel torque without slope coponent to be consider for sidewalk blockage detection.

Data.Name: P_tng_Nmps_WheelMotorTrqLowLimt
Data.Comment: Lower limit of the rate limiter for the powertrain torque request .

Data.Name: P_tng_Nmps_WheelMotorTrqUpLimit
Data.Comment: Upper limit of the rate limiter for the powertrain torque request .

Data.Name: P_tng_pct_SlopeTh4BrkCancel
Data.Comment: Slope threshold under witch the brake cancel phase is perform with the ramp strategy .

Data.Name: P_tng_s_Detection_While
Data.Comment: The minimal time between setting sidewalk detection flag and clearing the sidewalk detection flag.

Data.Name: P_tng_s_DetectionTime_FS
Data.Comment: Time between real sidewalk detection and setting the sidewalk detection flag.

Data.Name: P_tng_s_ElapsedTimeConfirmed
Data.Comment: Elapsed timpe threshold for no movement detection module.

Data.Name: P_tng_s_TauDerivFF
Data.Comment: Constant time for speed target low-pass filtering.

Data.Name: P_tng_s_tauSpeedControl
Data.Comment: Constant time for distance target adaptation regarding remaining distance to cover before stop.

Data.Name: P_tng_s_TempoBeforeRamp
Data.Comment: Temporisation before activating the take off strategie. .

Data.Name: P_tng_s_topWaitingTime
Data.Comment: Time with no wheel encoder change to consider that vehicle is at standstill.

Data.Name: P_tng_tic_WaitEngineTime
Data.Comment: Number of clock occurrences between motor torque request and beginning of maneuver

Data.Name: P_tng_tic_WaitReleaseTime
Data.Comment: Number of clock occurrences between end of movement and VMC switch-off

Data.Name: P_tng_x_derivativeBrakeGain
Data.Comment: Derivative gain of PID controler for emergengy/comfort braking regulation.

Data.Name: P_tng_x_EmergencyBraking
Data.Comment: Vehicle acceleration level target for emergency braking.

Data.Name: P_tng_x_FFDInitAccelMax
Data.Comment: Initial value of FFD maximum acceleration level target.

Data.Name: P_tng_x_FilterCoefficient
Data.Comment: Gain of the filtered derivative part of the PID controler.

Data.Name: P_tng_x_HFPB_TorqueModulation
Data.Comment: Factor to modulate higher anti-windup PI value.

Data.Name: P_tng_x_InitialValueRateLimiter
Data.Comment: Initial acceleration value of the rate limiter of Emergency regulation bloc.

Data.Name: P_tng_x_integralBrakeGain
Data.Comment: Integral gain of PID controler for emergengy/comfort braking regulation.

Data.Name: P_tng_x_integralGain_high
Data.Comment: PI regulator coefficient are interpolated regarding the distance to stop. This parameter is the high

Data.Name: P_tng_x_integralGain_low
Data.Comment: PI regulator coefficient are interpolated regarding the distance to stop. This parameter is the lowe

Data.Name: P_tng_x_Kb
Data.Comment: Gain parameter for anti wind-up term (PI).

Data.Name: P_tng_x_motorOptimON
Data.Comment: Parameter: activation of an adapted powertrain control strategy on slopes (switch on - switch off).

Data.Name: P_tng_x_MotorTorqueAdapt
Data.Comment: Factor for PWT torque request adaptation.

Data.Name: P_tng_x_proportionalBrakeGain
Data.Comment: Proportional gain of PID controler for emergengy/comfort braking regulation.

Data.Name: P_tng_x_proportionalGain_high
Data.Comment: PI regulator coefficient are interpolated regarding the distance to stop. This parameter is the high

Data.Name: P_tng_x_proportionalGain_low
Data.Comment: PI regulator coefficient are interpolated regarding the distance to stop. This parameter is the lowe

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ResetRateLimiter
Data.Comment: Reset input of the rate limiter bloc.

Data.Name: P_tng_s_Epsilon
Data.Comment: Elapsed timpe threshold for no movement detection module.

Data.Name: New
Data.Description: See failure management for the DTC list

Data.Name: DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Number of occurrence failure which has been detected for a specific DTC

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: DataWrite.VIN
Request.Comment: writable only once at renault plant

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000
